paper_wording.safe_claim: The system constructs explicit text-semantic summaries from scenario, condition, task, anomaly, failure taxonomy, critic, gap, and retrieval-key fields, and uses TF-IDF vectors indexed by FAISS as an auxiliary semantic retrieval signal.
paper_wording.avoid_claim: Do not claim this is a learned language encoder or neural embedding benchmark; the report measures lightweight TF-IDF + FAISS semantic retrieval only.
